name: Baldur's Gate 3
notes: Has a heavy Larian launcher that can be bypassed (--skip-launcher). Ships with both DX11 and Vulkan renderers — force_vulkan picks the Vulkan path which generally performs better on Linux. DX11/DXVK is a solid fallback if you encounter Vulkan issues. NVIDIA: NVAPI enables DLSS. AMD: RADV ICD ensures the Mesa Vulkan driver is used.
